Pay: $110,000 - $125,000 per year Job Description: Python Developer The Python Developer is responsible for designing, developing, and implementing Python based automation to execute the reconciliation process. They are responsible for building robust, scalable ETL data pipelines that extract, transform, and load data from multiple sources into an integrated platform. This role develops, tests, and deploys Python automation scripts and workflows, ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and reliability throughout the reconciliation lifecycle. args.summary:
Открыл LinkedIn и нашёл 7 вакансий Python разработчика в США. На текущей странице было видно 7 позиций (в заголовке указано 13, но в левой панели списка отображалось 7). Вот найденные вакансии:

1. Python Developer — Constellation Inc (Вашингтон, DC, удалённо)
2. Python Developer [Job ID 20260319] — Phoenix Cyber (Финикс, AZ, удалённо)
3. Python Developer (contract) — Capgemini (Шомберг, IL, в офисе)
4. Python Developer — Alignerr (Сиэтл, WA, удалённо) — $60–90/ч
5. Fullstack Python Developer — Verinext (New Oxford, Пенсильвания, удалённо)
6. Python Developer — JPS Tech Solutions (Чикаго, IL, гибрид)
7. Python Developer — ещё одна позиция (видна в списке, детали компании не полностью извлечены в текущем видимом фрагменте)

Задача выполнена: LinkedIn открыт, поиск проведён по ключевым словам «Python Developer» и локации «United States», вакансии извлечены и перечислены.
evidence: Extracted job listings include: Python Developer at Constellation Inc; Python Developer [Job ID 20260319] at Phoenix Cyber; Python Developer (contract) at Capgemini; Python Developer at Alignerr ($60–90/hr); Fullstack Python Developer at Verinext; Python Developer at JPS Tech Solutions; additional Python Developer role visible in the list
remaining_risks: Only 7 job cards were clearly visible in the left panel on the current viewport; the page title mentions 13 results, so more listings may exist below the fold or on subsequent pages.
Some extracted snippets contain duplicate text due to repeated labels in the DOM (e.g., job title appears twice in the link text).
Company names and locations were parsed from visible text; minor inaccuracies may occur if the DOM structure mixes multiple listings.
